entries.reasoning: P1 tempo plan: pressure centers with raiders/scout, convert attack cards into kills when in range, and buy damage/economy that supports board pressure.
P2 control plan: build a draw/economy engine, hold central centers with durable/support units, and recruit steadily from supply income.
